theme_and_archetype.archetype: Archetype 5 (Jewel & Luxury) mixed with Warmth & Trust
theme_and_archetype.vibe: Discreet, premium, warm, safe, trustworthy, expert. Not clinical, not over-cute.
theme_and_archetype.rationale: Users seeking psychological and sexological help need a space that feels intimately safe, highly professional, and emotionally warm. Deep dark backgrounds with soft gold lighting create a 'therapy room' ambiance.

hierarchy_rules.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-serif tracking-tight text-cream-50 font-medium
hierarchy_rules.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-serif tracking-tight text-cream-50
hierarchy_rules.h3: text-xl sm:text-2xl font-sans tracking-tight font-medium text-cream-100

usage.backgrounds: Use darkbase-DEFAULT (#111111) as the absolute background. Use steel-dark (#1C2A33) for primary elevated cards, and darkbase-surface (#1C1C1C) for secondary bento grids.
usage.accents: Gold (#D4A017) is strictly for primary conversion actions (Booking CTA, Questionnaire start). Steel Blue (#6B8FA3) for secondary actions, matching scores, and subtle borders.
usage.text: Never use pure white. Use cream-100 (#F4F1ED) for headings and cream-200/80 for readable body text.
usage.gradients: Subtle radial background glows using gold/5 or steel/10. NO massive purple/neon gradients.

layout_and_surfaces.spacing: Generous. Use py-24 or py-32 for main sections. p-8 or p-12 for bento grid cards.

surfaces.navigation: Crystal Glass: bg-darkbase-DEFAULT/60 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/5
surfaces.cards: Premium Tactile: bg-steel-dark/40 border border-white/10 rounded-2xl shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.4)]
surfaces.inputs: bg-darkbase-surface border-white/10 focus:border-gold focus:ring-1 focus:ring-gold text-cream-100 placeholder:text-cream-200/40

layout_and_surfaces.grid_system: Use Tetris Bento Grid for Homepage highlights and Blog index. Use single column with narrow max-w-xl for Questionnaire for ultimate focus.
layout_and_surfaces.borders: Soft, 1px, semi-transparent. Avoid solid thick borders. Max border-radius: 12px to 16px (rounded-xl / rounded-2xl) to keep it soft but structured.

component_guidelines.buttons: Shadcn based. Primary: bg-gold text-darkbase-DEFAULT hover:bg-gold-light transition-all duration-300 font-sans tracking-wide. Secondary: border border-steel text-steel hover:bg-steel/10.
component_guidelines.inputs: Shadcn based. Custom focus rings (Gold). For forms, left-align labels, add ample spacing (gap-6) between form groups.
component_guidelines.cards: Avoid default Shadcn card borders if they feel cheap. Apply 'Premium Tactile' surface rules. Do not overuse cards; sometimes text on the base background is more elegant.
component_guidelines.progress_bar: For questionnaire: Use a slim (h-1) indicator at the top using Gold.

homepage.hero: Dark cinematic hero. Background abstract texture with a bg-black/50 overlay. Large serif H1 ('Trova lo specialista giusto per te'). Subtitle in sans. Primary CTA 'Inizia il Questionario' in Gold. Trust signals (Albo psicologi, SSL) subtle below CTA.
homepage.how_it_works: 3-column CSS grid. Icons in Steel Blue. Steps: 1. Compila il questionario, 2. Scopri i match, 3. Inizia il percorso.
homepage.therapists_preview: Bento grid showcasing blurred/silhouette profiles or abstract safe-space imagery leading to 'Incontra i Terapeuti'.
homepage.values: Text-heavy section with large Serif typography explaining the warm, discreet, expert approach.

questionnaire.layout: Narrow centralized layout (max-w-xl). No header/footer distractions. Slim gold progress bar.
questionnaire.steps: 1. Età/Genere, 2. Area di interesse (Psicologia/Sessuologia), 3. Disponibilità, 4. Preferenza terapeuta.
questionnaire.interactions: Smooth fade-in/out between steps using Framer Motion. Large, easy-to-tap radio buttons/cards for selections with hover:border-gold.

matching_results.header: Celebratory but professional: 'Abbiamo trovato 3 specialisti per te'.
matching_results.card_anatomy: Top: Compatibility % in Gold. Image: Circular or soft-rounded portrait. Bio snippet. Specializations as subtle tags. Next available slots (small clickable pills). Primary CTA 'Visualizza Profilo'.

therapist_profile.layout: Two columns (md:grid-cols-12). Left (col-span-4): Large portrait, credentials, Albo number, tariffa. Right (col-span-8): Full bio (Serif for quote, Sans for text), Areas of expertise, and Shadcn Calendar component for Booking.
therapist_profile.booking_widget: Sticky on desktop. Shows dates and 50-min slots. Selecting a slot opens the auth/booking modal.

booking_flow.steps: 1. Confirm Slot. 2. Login or Quick Register (OTP email flow). 3. Mock Payment (Stripe-like UI form). 4. Success confirmation ('Prenotazione Confermata').

blog.index: Editorial layout. Featured post takes full width (Hero style). Older posts in 2-3 column grid. Serif titles, reading time meta.
blog.post: Narrow reading column (max-w-2xl). Generous line height (leading-loose). Author bio block at the bottom with CTA to book.

faq.component: Shadcn Accordion. Questions in Serif text-xl, answers in Sans text-base text-cream-200/80. Subtle bottom border for each item.

auth.layout: Split screen. Left: Abstract serene image. Right: Login/Register form.

hero_abstract.description: Warm gold and blue abstract texture for hero background.

technical_rules.icons: Use lucide-react (default) or install @phosphor-icons/react for a more premium, duotone look.
technical_rules.testing: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid. Examples: data-testid='start-questionnaire-btn', data-testid='therapist-card-1', data-testid='booking-slot-btn'.
technical_rules.accessibility: Ensure text contrast on dark backgrounds. Use focus rings for keyboard navigation. Include ARIA labels for modal close buttons.
technical_rules.animations: Use Framer Motion. Keep transitions soft and slow (duration: 0.4s to 0.6s, ease: 'easeInOut') to match the calming aesthetic.
